'''鈭歴-ch-b''' ('''kasachab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whoopee|whoopee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whoopee|whoopee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-ch-b
|-
! Lemma
| kasachab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisachab|thisachab]] || [[word:jisachab|jisachab]] || [[word:shisachab|shisachab]] || [[word:kisachab|kisachab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusachab|thuthusachab]] || [[word:jujusachab|jujusachab]] || [[word:shushusachab|shushusachab]] || [[word:kukusachab|kukusachab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusachab|thusachab]] || [[word:jusachab|jusachab]] || [[word:shusachab|shusachab]] || [[word:kusachab|kusachab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusachab|thusachab]] || [[word:jusachab|jusachab]] || [[word:shusachab|shusachab]] || [[word:kusachab|kusachab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesachab|thesachab]] || [[word:jesachab|jesachab]] || [[word:shesachab|shesachab]] || [[word:kesachab|kesachab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosachab|thothosachab]] || [[word:jojosachab|jojosachab]] || [[word:shoshosachab|shoshosachab]] || [[word:kokosachab|kokosachab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosachab|thosachab]] || [[word:josachab|josachab]] || [[word:shosachab|shosachab]] || [[word:kosachab|kosachab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosachab|thosachab]] || [[word:josachab|josachab]] || [[word:shosachab|shosachab]] || [[word:kosachab|kosachab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sachab|th忙sachab]] || [[word:j忙sachab|j忙sachab]] || [[word:sh忙sachab|sh忙sachab]] || [[word:k忙sachab|k忙sachab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasachab|thathasachab]] || [[word:jajasachab|jajasachab]] || [[word:shashasachab|shashasachab]] || [[word:kakasachab|kakasachab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasachab|thasachab]] || [[word:jasachab|jasachab]] || [[word:shasachab|shasachab]] || [[word:kasachab|kasachab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasachab|thasachab]] || [[word:jasachab|jasachab]] || [[word:shasachab|shasachab]] || [[word:kasachab|kasachab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasachab|shasachab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasachab|goshasachab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasachab|gokishasachab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasachabn眉|shasachabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasachabnkn眉|goshasachabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachabn眉|gokishasachabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasachabsh毛|shasachabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasachabnksh毛|goshasachabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasachabsh毛|gokishasachabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachabro|shasachabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachabnkro|goshasachabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachabro|gokishasachabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachabmu|shasachabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachabnkmu|goshasachabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachabmu|gokishasachabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasachabsher|shasachabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasachabnksher|goshasachabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasachabsher|gokishasachabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasachabng|shasachabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasachabnkng|goshasachabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasachabng|gokishasachabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasachabya|shasachabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasachabnkya|goshasachabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasachabya|gokishasachabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasachabyam|shasachabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasachabnkyam|goshasachabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasachabyam|gokishasachabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachabn眉sh毛|shasachabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachabnkn眉sh毛|goshasachabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachabn眉sh毛|gokishasachabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachabn眉ro|shasachabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachabnkn眉ro|goshasachabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachabn眉ro|gokishasachabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachabn眉mu|shasachabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachabnkn眉mu|goshasachabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachabn眉mu|gokishasachabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachabsh毛n眉|shasachabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachabnksh毛n眉|goshasachabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachabsh毛n眉|gokishasachabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachabsh毛ro|shasachabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachabnksh毛ro|goshasachabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachabsh毛ro|gokishasachabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachabsh毛mu|shasachabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachabnksh毛mu|goshasachabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachabsh毛mu|gokishasachabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachabron眉|shasachabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachabnkron眉|goshasachabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachabron眉|gokishasachabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachabrosh毛|shasachabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachabnkrosh毛|goshasachabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachabrosh毛|gokishasachabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachabromu|shasachabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachabnkromu|goshasachabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachabromu|gokishasachabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachabmun眉|shasachabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachabnkmun眉|goshasachabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachabmun眉|gokishasachabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachabmush毛|shasachabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachabnkmush毛|goshasachabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachabmush毛|gokishasachabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachabmuro|shasachabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachabnkmuro|goshasachabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachabmuro|gokishasachabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
